sources.title: Spitzer RL, Kroenke K, Williams JBW, Löwe B. A brief measure for assessing generalized anxiety disorder: the GAD-7. Arch Intern Med. 2006;166(10):1092-1097.
sources.note: [VERIFY] canonical source; re-confirm items and cutoffs via web before relying on them

items.item: Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge
search_terms: feeling nervous anxious or on edge

items.item: Not being able to stop or control worrying
search_terms: not able to stop or control worrying

items.item: Worrying too much about different things
search_terms: worrying too much about different things

items.item: Being so restless that it is hard to sit still
search_terms: recent restlessness hard to sit still

items.item: Feeling afraid as if something awful might happen
search_terms: feelings of foreboding something awful might happen

scoring: Each item scored 0-3 over the last 2 weeks; total = sum of 7 items (range 0-21). Cutoffs: >=5 mild, >=10 moderate, >=15 severe. [VERIFY] cutoffs before clinical interpretation.
note: Definition is biobank-agnostic (items + scoring + source). The UKB field mapping per item is produced by the KG query step and stored in rules.json, NOT here — keep concept (definition) and mapping (UKB-specific) separate.
